title: Resetting Your Active Directory / SSO Password
text:
Q: How do I reset my Active Directory / SSO password?
A: To reset your Active Directory / SSO password, follow these steps: Step 1: Press 'Ctrl + Alt + Delete' on your keyboard. Step 2: Select 'Change a password' from the options presented. Step 3: Enter your current password in the 'Old password' field. Step 4: Type your new password in the 'New password' field. Step 5: Confirm your new password by entering it again in the 'Confirm password' field. Step 6: Click 'OK' to complete the process. Step 7: If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com or call extension 1234 for assistance.
